problem id: 6a635e3e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10100100 -> 11011010
  01101101 -> 11010110
  10100001 -> 10111010
  01011100 -> 00011101
  01111100 -> 00011111
  11100010 -> 01101110
  01100100 -> 11011110
  00100010 -> 01101110

query: 11110111
predicted answer: 10001111
